primary_instructions: Build the MVP before optional features.
Keep the app local, simple, and demo-ready.
Use Python, Streamlit, markdown files, and OpenAI API.
Do not add vector search or full RAG before the markdown-based MVP works.
Do not make unsupported consulting claims in generated content.
Update README.md when setup or usage changes.
restricted_actions: change project scope without updating PROJECT_REQUIREMENTS.md
add vector database before MVP completion
